videos.title: BEST iOS 27 Feature - Spatial Reframing
videos.description:
Spatial Reframing is one of the coolest features on iOS 27. You can adjust the angle and perspective of any photo using generative AI.

videos.description:

With it’s premium aluminum unibody design, one of the best 3K AMOLED displays on a laptop and the new updated Series 3 Intel chips makes this one of the best laptops to get for 2026. It also features great all day battery life and paired with other Samsung Galaxy Devices + AI features making it even more powerful to use.

videos.description:

- This next gen chip features a Grace CPU and Blackwell GPU

- 128GB of Unified Memory 

It's running here on the new ASUS Pro Art 16, one of the newest laptops to feature it and is considerably thinner than last year.
